Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Basile for Vida Bolouchi. Benjamin Ballard and John Bryant for Hadi Shalchi and Pari Shalchi.

Counsel confirmed that they are all in agreement that one half of the property is in title of the Estate, that there is a partition action and that they will proceed by way of the partition action. Discussion was held as to the matter being granted or dismissed, and whether pending discovery is to be addressed in this action or the partition action. The Court clarified that discovery should be addressed in the partition action. Mr. Ballard stated the Parties are moving towards resolution and that they will keep the option of mediation open. The Petition for Order Directing Transfer of Title to Real Property was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Valerie Higgins for Vida Bolouchi (Administrator). John Bryant for Hadi Shalchi and Pari Shalchi (Parents of the Decedent/Claimants of more than 50% of the property).

The Parties are not in agreement as the percentage of onwnership/interest the Estate holds in the property. Mr. Bryant raised the issue of a partition action and his Client's contributions to the property. The Petition for Order Directing Transfer of Title to Real Property was continued to October 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery and trial setting.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Basile for Vida Bolouchi. John Bryant for Hadi Shalchi.

The Petition for Order Directing Transfer of Title to Real Property was continued to August 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Bryant to provide information regarding rents and expenses from date of death until now, rental contracts and legal authority regarding theory of equitable interest within 30-days.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To May-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Basile for Vida Bolouchi (Petitioner). John Bryant for Pari Shalcui (Objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions and the Petitioner does not want to give up her right to have priority to serve as the Administrator. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Limited Authority (subject to review of the order). No bond is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
